content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 19:17 CDT] Capture full ad creative screenshots for Galleria BMW from Meta Ad Library and Google Ads Transparency. We need the best quality screenshots of their actual ads — vehicles, copy, offers, pricing.

## Setup
Use /opt/homebrew/bin/python3
Scripts at ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ad-scraper/

## Run:

```bash
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ad-scraper

# Capture Meta ad creatives with scrolling
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 capture_ad_creatives.py "Galleria BMW"

# Google Ads Transparency — domain search
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 google_ads.py "galleriabmw.com"
```

## Make sure to get multiple scroll positions in Meta (0, 400, 800, 1200, 1600px minimum) so we see a range of their ads.

## Copy to workspace:
```bash
mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/galleria-bmw-fresh
cp /tmp/creatives_galleria_bmw/*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/creatives/galleria-bmw-fresh/ 2>/dev/null
cp /tmp/google_ads_galleriabmw*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/ 2>/dev/null
```

## Report:
1. List all screenshots captured
2. Describe the best 5 Meta ad screenshots — what vehicle, what copy, what offer, what price if shown
3. Describe what the Google Ads Transparency results show — ad formats, models, headlines visible
4. Flag any ads showing specific pricing, lease offers, or finance terms
I'll start by examining the scripts to understand what they do, then run them.

Thinking.text: Scripts look good. Let me run both scrapers and then copy the results.

content.Text: Scripts look good. Running both scrapers now.

content.Text: 22 Meta screenshots + 4 Google screenshots captured. Now let me review the key ones.

Thinking.text: Now let me look at the individual ad detail screenshots and the Google Ads screenshots.

content.Text: Now let me examine the individual ad detail pages and Google screenshots.

1	#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
2	"""
3	Capture full individual ad creatives from Meta Ad Library.
4	Extracts Library IDs from the overview page, then visits each ad's detail page.
5	"""
6	import sys, time, os, re
7	from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox
8	
9	def capture_creatives(dealer_name: str, max_ads: int = 8):
10	    slug = dealer_name.lower().replace(' ', '_')
11	    output_dir = f'/tmp/creatives_{slug}'
12	    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
13	
14	    url = f"https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/?active_status=active&ad_type=all&country=US&q={dealer_name.replace(' ', '+')}&search_type=keyword_unordered"
15	
16	    with Camoufox(headless=True) as browser:
17	        page = browser.new_page()
18	        page.set_viewport_size({"width": 1440, "height": 900})
19	        page.goto(url, wait_until='networkidle', timeout=30000)
20	        time.sleep(4)
21	
22	        # Scroll down progressively to load all ad cards and capture overview
23	        for i in range(6):
24	            pos = i * 400
25	            page.evaluate(f'window.scrollTo(0, {pos})')
26	            time.sleep(1.5)
27	            page.screenshot(path=f'{output_dir}/overview_scroll_{pos}.png')
28	            print(f'Overview at scroll {pos} saved')
29	
30	        # Extract all Library IDs from page text
31	        page_text = page.evaluate('document.body.innerText')
32	        library_ids = re.findall(r'Library ID:\s*(\d+)', page_text)
33	        library_ids = list(dict.fromkeys(library_ids))  # deduplicate preserving order
34	        print(f'\nFound {len(library_ids)} unique Library IDs: {library_ids}')
35	
36	        # Also try to extract via "See ad details" buttons/links
37	        details_buttons = page.query_selector_all('text="See ad details"')
38	        print(f'Found {len(details_buttons)} "See ad details" buttons')
39	
40	        # Visit each ad detail page using Library ID
41	        for i, lib_id in enumerate(library_ids[:max_ads]):
42	            try:
43	                ad_url = f'https://www.facebook.com/ads/library/?id={lib_id}'
44	                print(f'\nVisiting ad {i+1}: {ad_url}')
45	                page.goto(ad_url, wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
46	                time.sleep(3)
47	
48	                # Scroll down a bit to ensure creative is visible
49	                page.evaluate('window.scrollTo(0, 200)')
50	                time.sleep(1)
51	
52	                # Viewport screenshot (what you'd see)
53	                page.screenshot(path=f'{output_dir}/ad_{i+1}_view.png', full_page=False)
54	
55	                # Full page screenshot (captures everything)
56	                page.screenshot(path=f'{output_dir}/ad_{i+1}_full.png', full_page=True)
57	                print(f'Ad {i+1} (ID: {lib_id}) captured')
58	
59	            except Exception as e:
60	                print(f'Ad {i+1} error: {e}')
61	                continue
62	
63	    print(f'\nAll screenshots saved to {output_dir}')
64	    return output_dir
65	
66	if __name__ == '__main__':
67	    dealer = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'Galleria BMW'
68	    capture_creatives(dealer)
69

content.Text:
1	#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
2	"""
3	Google Ads Transparency scraper for TAS.
4	Usage: python3 google_ads.py "Price LeBlanc Lexus"
5	"""
6	
7	import sys
8	import json
9	import time
10	from datetime import datetime
11	from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox
12	
13	
14	def scrape_google_ads(dealer_name: str, output_file: str = None) -> dict:
15	    results = {
16	        "dealer": dealer_name,
17	        "scraped_at": datetime.now().isoformat(),
18	        "source": "google_ads_transparency",
19	        "active_ads": [],
20	        "ad_count": 0,
21	        "ads_parsed": [],
22	        "url_after_search": None,
23	        "error": None
24	    }
25	
26	    # Navigate directly to URL with query param (most reliable)
27	    search_url = f"https://adstransparency.google.com/?q={dealer_name.replace(' ', '+')}&region=US"
28	
29	    try:
30	        with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
31	            page = browser.new_page()
32	            page.goto(search_url, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=30000)
33	            time.sleep(3)
34	
35	            # Take initial screenshot
36	            page.screenshot(path=f"/tmp/google_ads_{dealer_name.replace(' ', '_')}_initial.png")
37	
38	            # Try to find and interact with search — multiple strategies
39	            content = page.inner_text("body")
40	
41	            # Strategy 1: Look for search input and submit
42	            try:
43	                page.wait_for_selector('input', timeout=8000)
44	                inputs = page.query_selector_all('input')
45	                search_input = None
46	                for inp in inputs:
47	                    try:
48	                        if inp.is_visible():
49	                            search_input = inp
50	                            break
51	                    except:
52	                        pass
53	
54	                if search_input:
55	                    # Clear and type
56	                    search_input.click(click_count=3)
57	                    time.sleep(0.3)
58	                    search_input.type(dealer_name, delay=80)
59	                    time.sleep(1)
60	
61	                    # Take screenshot to see autocomplete state
62	                    page.screenshot(path=f"/tmp/google_ads_{dealer_name.replace(' ', '_')}_typed.png")
63	
64	                    # Wait for autocomplete dropdown
65	                    time.sleep(2)
66	
67	                    # Try clicking first autocomplete option
68	                    autocomplete_selectors = [
69	                        '[role="option"]',
70	                        '[role="listitem"]',
71	                        'mat-option',
72	                        '.pac-item',
73	                        '[class*="suggestion"]',
74	                        '[class*="autocomplete"]',
75	                        '[class*="dropdown"] li',
76	                        '[class*="dropdown"] a',
77	                    ]
78	                    clicked = False
79	                    for sel in autocomplete_selectors:
80	                        try:
81	                            opts = page.query_selector_all(sel)
82	                            for opt in opts:
83	                                if opt.is_visible():
84	                                    print(f"Clicking autocomplete: {sel} -> {opt.inner_text()[:60]}")
85	                                    opt.click()
86	                                    clicked = True
87	                                    time.sleep(3)
88	                                    break
89	                        except:
90	                            pass
91	                        if clicked:
92	                            break
93	
94	                    if not clicked:
95	                        # No autocomplete — try pressing Enter
96	                        print("No autocomplete found, pressing Enter")
97	                        search_input.press('Enter')
98	                        time.sleep(3)
99	
100	                    # Check ...
